summary: Testing of 3 new features: (1) Admin redesign (PRINCIPAL midnight+gold / SECONDARY slate+teal), (2) Pre-approval Review Modal for employers and partners, (3) Duplicate buttons for offers, universities, housing, scholarships. All backend APIs pass (17/17). All frontend flows verified. One bug found and fixed: housing duplicate used 'title' field instead of 'type' field for the (copie) suffix.

minor.issue: BUG FIXED: Was setting copy['title'] but housing uses 'type' field as display name. Fixed to copy['type']. Faulty test duplicates cleaned up from DB.

ui_bugs.issue: Empty string passed to img src when offer has no image: renders src='' causing browser to reload whole page. Should use src={offer.image || undefined}

action_items: Fix empty img src in OffersSection.jsx: change src={offer.image} to src={offer.image || undefined} to avoid browser requesting empty URLs
OPTIONAL: Clean up duplicate test data in DB (offers have many 'copie (copie) (copie)' artifacts from previous test runs)
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: admin.py housing duplicate used copy['title'] but housing model uses 'type' field for display. Fixed to copy['type'] in /app/api/routers/admin.py line 238
Empty img src in OffersSection.jsx: When offer.image is undefined/empty string, causes unnecessary network request. Minor but visible in console
EmployerReviewModal shows 'Dossier incomplet' warning correctly when company info or official doc is missing - this works as designed
Partner Review Modal shows partnerCode (e.g. PA-BF237N22) in the modal info - useful for admin verification
seed_data_creation: Test duplicates created and cleaned up. Partner/Employer were temporarily rejected for modal testing, then re-approved via modal approve flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: (1) Admin PRINCIPAL redesign dark+gold working, SECONDARY slate+teal by design. (2) ReviewModal for employers and partners opens with full data and Approve/Reject functionality. (3) Duplicate buttons work for all 4 content types - housing bug was fixed (title→type). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features_29.py (17 tests, all pass). Minor: empty img src in OffersSection.jsx console warnings.

rca_of_bug.root_cause: admin.py admin_duplicate_housing function set copy['title'] for the '(copie)' suffix, but Housing model uses 'type' (not 'title') as its display name. The housing documents have no 'title' field.
rca_of_bug.fix: Changed copy['title'] to copy['type'] in /app/api/routers/admin.py line 238
rca_of_bug.impact: Before fix: duplicated housing items appeared with same visible name as original. After fix: duplicated housing shows 'OriginalType (copie)'
